name: @platform/api-runtime
description: HTTP API server runtime: request routing, middleware pipeline, auth enforcement, and response envelope.

readme.summary: HTTP API server runtime: request routing, middleware pipeline, auth enforcement, and response envelope.
responsibilities: Own the HTTP server lifecycle and request routing foundation
Provide middleware pipeline for auth, logging, tracing, and rate-limiting
Enforce authentication and authorization at the API boundary
Emit structured audit events and observability signals per request
nonResponsibilities: Does not define domain logic or business rules
Does not own GraphQL schema or resolver implementation
Does not manage persistent storage directly
usage: Imported by application packages to construct and start the HTTP server
Feature packages compose domain logic behind API handlers registered here
operationalNotes: All inbound requests pass through the auth middleware before reaching handlers
Structured request logs are emitted via observability package
